notes: Engage $4, Perform $11, Total Platform $16. SCIM gated to Perform tier and above.

team_price_text: Teams Starter Pack: $19.95/mo flat (up to 10 members)
notes: Teams Starter Pack is $19.95/mo flat to 10 users (~$2/u/mo). SCIM provisioning requires Business tier.
Pricing no longer fully listed publicly. X2 $24/u/mo, X4 $44/u/mo, X6+ enterprise. SCIM availability/pricing not publicly disclosed.
No native SCIM provisioning on any plan. Enterprise tier has SAML SSO with JIT only, no automated deprovisioning. Contact-based pricing model, not per-user.
Teams SKU supports SAML only. Full SCIM provisioning requires Enterprise/ETLA agreement, custom-quoted. Pricing rose to ~$23.99/u/mo on annual.
Teams plan does NOT support SCIM at all; status updated from 'partial' to 'gated'. SCIM only on Enterprise, and only with Azure AD or Google Workspace IdPs (Okta etc. locked out).

Status changed from 'none' to 'gated'. SCIM provisioning IS available on Enterprise plan ($1,499/mo+), per Ahrefs help docs. SAML SSO + SCIM gated to Enterprise. Lite/Standard/Advanced do not support SCIM. Plans are seat-based with add-on users; not strictly per-user-per-month pricing.
Business ($45/u/mo) does NOT include SCIM; Enterprise Scale required. Custom-quoted, typically starts above $65/seat/mo at 50+ seats.
Plus is $49/mo flat (unlimited seats, MTU-capped). SCIM requires Growth or Enterprise, custom-quoted. Median Amplitude contract $63.7K/yr.
No public pricing. Sales-led, multi-year contracts. SCIM is supported (Blackboard provides SCIM URL + token) on enterprise deployments. Typical 5,000-learner deployment GBP 65K-100K/yr.
Per-connection licensing, not per-user. Solo $14.90, Standard $49.90, Advanced $111.90/mo. SCIM/advanced enterprise features require Ultimate tier (custom-priced).
Property management software priced per unit (not per user). No public SCIM documentation found. Status remains unknown.
Business now $15/u/mo flat (moved from hourly billing). Enterprise $2,500/mo for 100 users includes SCIM + SAML/OIDC SSO. Normalized to ~$25/u/mo for multiplier.
SCIM (User provisioning) explicitly gated to Enterprise tier. Starter $10.99, Advanced $24.99, Enterprise/Enterprise+ contact sales.
Foundations $400/mo flat (no SCIM). SCIM 2.0 only on Growth/Enterprise, custom-quoted ($30K-$70K/yr for 100-300 emp).
IT Dept tiers: Professional $149, Expert $189, Master $219/tech/mo (annual). No public SCIM support documented across plans. Per-technician pricing.
Status changed from 'partial' to 'none'. No SCIM 2.0 endpoint; no native IdP/SCIM connectors. User management via proprietary REST API only. Per-provider + percent of collections billing.

team_price_text: Add-on on top of any Atlassian product plan
notes: Guard Standard $4.20/u/mo includes SCIM. Guard Premium $8.18/u/mo. Add-on layered on top of Jira/Confluence/etc. Multiplier N/A because no base 'team plan' on this product specifically.
Status changed from 'unknown' to 'gated'. Free (3 seats), Plus $29, Pro $69, Enterprise custom (~$119+/u/mo). SAML SSO + SCIM gated to Enterprise.

Status changed from 'free' to 'gated' based on 2026 B2B plan restructuring. Self-Service SSO included in B2B Essentials; inbound SCIM (directory sync) requires B2B Professional ($800/mo). Pricing is MAU-based, not strict per-user-per-month. Multiplier from flat plan prices.

Status changed from 'unknown' to 'gated'. SCIM gated behind Business Success Plan (separate subscription, pricing not public). Product subscriptions range ~$500-$3,375/yr; Premium upgrade ~$300/yr/seat.

Per-computer (not per-user) pricing. Business Backup ~$99/comp/yr; with Enterprise Control add-on ~$123/comp/yr (= $24/comp/yr add-on). Enterprise Control includes SCIM/SSO. Multiplier compares total with add-on vs base.
Enterprise tier ($18/mo+) adds SAML SSO only. No SCIM provisioning support documented across any plan. Project-count pricing, not per-user.
Status changed from 'unknown' to 'none'. BambooHR does NOT support inbound SCIM provisioning on any plan; acts as outbound HR source-of-truth only. Core $10, Pro $17, Elite $25/emp/mo.

SCIM/SSO only on Pro Unlimited ($299/mo flat annual; $349 monthly) and only via Okta connector. No native SCIM for Entra/Google/OneLogin. Updated from 'none' to 'gated' since Okta-based SCIM does exist.
Free tier, Premium $10/u/mo, Advanced $18/u/mo. No SCIM documented at any tier.
Plans are flat-priced not per-user (Free, Core $10/mo, Growth $35/mo, Premium $300/mo, Enterprise custom). SSO/SCIM via Okta only on Enterprise. Updated from 'none' to 'gated'.
Starter $99/mo (up to 10 members), Pro from $218/mo, Enterprise custom. SCIM only on Enterprise. Plans are flat-fee.
SCIM included on Teams ($4/u/mo) and Enterprise ($6/u/mo). Lowest paid tier already includes SCIM, so effectively no SCIM tax.
Could not verify on 2026-06-12. All pricing sales-quoted; SCIM not confirmed on public materials.
Start $29/mo annual, Grow $69, Scale $149, Custom from $349. Flat-fee per business. No SCIM documented.
SCIM provisioning available from Business ($15/u/mo) upward. Business Starter $5/u/mo lacks SCIM. Box uses partly proprietary provisioning APIs via Okta/Entra.
Free Bootstrap; Startup $157/mo, Growth $273, Business $439 annual. SSO and advanced security only on Pro (custom). Updated from 'unknown' to 'gated'.
Essentials free; Premium $12/u/mo; Enterprise custom. SCIM/advanced controls on Premium and above. Multiplier undefined due to free base.
Live from $29/mo per parallel. Enterprise (25+ user min) has SSO/SAML and SCIM with custom pricing; typical $12k-$40k/yr.
Free tier; Essentials $5/channel, Team $10/channel. Buffer charges per channel not per user. No SCIM at any tier.
Event-volume pricing: Select ~$23/mo, Preferred ~$39/mo. SSO-based auto provisioning on Preferred; native SCIM Enterprise-only.
Free, Pro $20/u/mo cloud-only, Enterprise custom yearly. SCIM, 2FA, audit log Enterprise-only.
Standard increased from $10 to $12/u/mo. Teams $20/u/mo. SCIM only on Enterprise with $15k/yr minimum.
Teams entry $10/u/mo (newer Business signups ~$20/u/mo). SCIM only on Canva Enterprise / for Districts. Enterprise pricing not public.
SCIM only via Okta connector and only on Scale plan (~$224 per stakeholder list). Launch flat for very small companies.
Free plan up to 4 users; Essentials and Enterprise+ custom/sales-quoted. SSO on paid tiers; SCIM not specifically documented.
Free, Early Stage $36/mo, Growth $96/mo, Enterprise custom. SCIM not documented on public materials.
Starter free up to $250k cumulative billing then 0.75%. Performance $599/mo, Enterprise custom. SAML SSO only on Enterprise; no native SCIM. 'None' retained.
Free, Performance from $15/mo, Scale custom (~$2k+/mo). SCIM not explicitly named in public materials.
March 2026 overhaul: Launch $185/mo, Growth $495/mo, Enterprise custom (SSO/RBAC). Flat/credit-based. SCIM not explicitly named.
Starter $12/u/mo, Team $15, Premier $27, Enterprise custom. SCIM as separately-priced add-on across tiers.
Free, Unlimited $7/u/mo, Business $12, Business Plus $19, Enterprise custom. SAML SSO and SCIM only on Enterprise.

Clio offers SAML SSO across plans via Clio Identity, but native SCIM provisioning is not publicly documented. Okta provisioning connector exists. Plans: EasyStart $49, Essentials $89, Advanced $119, Complete $149 (per user/mo, annual).
Status updated none -> gated. Enterprise plan ($11.99/seat/mo annual, $14.99 monthly) now lists SCIM provisioning. Basic is lowest paid tier at $3.99/u/mo.
Cloudcraft offers SAML SSO on Enterprise ($120/u/mo), but no public SCIM provisioning support documented. Existing Datadog customers get SSO free.
Status updated unknown -> gated. Enterprise plan includes SAML SSO and SCIM user provisioning. Pro is $10/maker/mo annual ($12 monthly); Team is $30/maker/mo annual. Enterprise is custom pricing.

Status updated none -> gated. Now branded Windsurf. Enterprise tier at $60/u/mo includes SSO + SCIM (RBAC, compliance certifications). Teams tier $35/u/mo does not include SCIM. Teams capped at 200 seats.
Pricing is flat-fee per organization (interview volume) rather than per-user. Starter $80/mo, Team $400/mo, Enterprise custom. SSO with SCIM available only on Enterprise/Custom tier.
Lite at $300/mo flat (20 users). SCIM requires Premium or Enterprise tier on High Availability or Scale infrastructure. Enterprise contracts typically mid-five figures to six figures annually.
Status updated unknown -> gated. SCIM provisioning requires Business plan ($99/seat/mo annual, $134 monthly). Only supported through Okta connector; SSO/SAML must be configured first.

Per parent agent notes: Teams plan now includes SCIM at $399/user/year (multiplier collapses to 1.0). Plan still gated above free but SCIM is no longer Enterprise-only. Enterprise still available for 500+ users with additional integrations.

Status updated unknown -> gated. SAML SSO and SCIM provisioning available only on Enterprise plan ($450+/mo, custom). Team plan ($179/mo) does not include SCIM. Per-organization flat pricing, not per-user.
SCIM provisioning gated to Enterprise tier ($184.99/device/year). SCIM only works reliably through Okta connector. Pro tier ($99.99/device/year) does not include SCIM.
AMP supports LDAP and (in-development) OIDC for SSO on Advanced/Enterprise editions. No SCIM provisioning support documented. License is per-instance lifetime, not per-user subscription.

Culture Amp does not support SCIM by design. They separate authentication (SAML SSO) from employee data, which they prefer to sync via HRIS integrations rather than IdP. Pricing is custom per module/employee count.
Cypress Cloud Business plan ($267/mo) adds SAML SSO. No SCIM provisioning publicly documented across any tier. Enterprise is custom but SCIM not advertised.

Status updated unknown -> gated. Dagster+ Pro tier includes SSO, RBAC, and SCIM provisioning (with Google, GitHub, SAML IdPs). Solo ($10/mo + $0.040/credit) and Starter ($100/mo + $0.035/credit) do not include SCIM. Pro pricing is quote-based.
Standard tier retired; Business now baseline at $8/u/mo and includes SAML SSO + SCIM provisioning. Multiplier collapses to 1.0. (Legacy Business and Omnix plans being rebranded; SCIM still included.)

Standard tier retired Oct 2025 on AWS/GCP (Azure by Oct 2026). Premium is now baseline and includes Unity Catalog, RBAC, audit logging, and SCIM. Multiplier collapses to 1.0. Enterprise adds compliance certifications and SLAs but SCIM is already in Premium.

Datadog now includes SCIM 2.0 provisioning on Pro Infrastructure ($15/host/mo annual). Multiplier collapses to 1.0. Enterprise ($23/host/mo) still adds custom RBAC and additional admin features. Note: Microsoft Entra provisioning is currently blocked due to a Microsoft security freeze.
SSO and SCIM provisioning restricted to Enterprise tier (custom pricing, starts around $499/mo). Professional plan at €149/mo does not include SCIM.
Status updated none -> gated. SCIM provisioning gated behind Enterprise tier (~$300/u/mo, 3x Team). Only supports Okta and Entra ID as SSO providers for SCIM.

Status updated unknown -> gated. SCIM provisioning available only on Enterprise tier (custom pricing) and supports Okta, Azure AD, JumpCloud. Deel HR is free but does not include SCIM. Contractor Management $49/contractor/mo is lowest paid product. Deel is designed primarily as HR source-of-truth pushing data to IdPs.

Business tier (~$57.49/u/mo annual) adds SCIM provisioning, domain capture, and enterprise admin features. Lower tiers (Starter $8.74/u/mo, Advanced) do not include SCIM. Enterprise above Business is custom.
SCIM provisioning and SAML/OIDC directory sync gated to Enterprise (custom pricing). Team plan at $31.20/editor/mo annual ($39 monthly) does not include SCIM.

Status updated none -> gated. Native SCIM provisioning now on Dialpad Connect Pro ($25/u/mo annual, $35 monthly). Standard ($15/u/mo) does not include SCIM. Enterprise (custom) adds dedicated support.
Flat domain/report-volume pricing. SSO/SAML on Defender ($200/mo) and Ultimate ($3,900/mo) but no SCIM at any tier.
Domain-based flat pricing. SCIM only on Enterprise (~$499/mo). Free Personal tier for non-business use. Normalized Basic flat $19.99/mo to ~$2/u/mo.
SCIM only on Business. Pro $9 is single-user; Team is first multi-user plan. Dataset previously listed team as Pro $9; corrected to Team $15.
Personal $10/mo is single-user. Standard is lowest team-suitable plan. SCIM requires Enterprise Edition (Wave 1 June 2025 users, Wave 2 Q4 2025 groups).
SAML SSO on Team; SCIM exclusive to Enterprise. Third-party estimates Enterprise ~$30-40/u/mo.
Annual flat pricing by employee bands. Essential ~$7.5K, Foundation ~$15K, Advanced ~$37K, Enterprise ~$25K+. SCIM (Okta-only) on Enterprise.
Pricing private; third-party estimates. SCIM only on Premier/Enterprise. Drift now part of Salesloft.
SCIM 2.0 supported on Standard business plan and above. SSO must be enabled first. Lowest business team plan includes SCIM; not on free or individual Plus tier.
Pro plan offers SAML SSO but no SCIM at any tier.
Duo Directory (directory sync/SCIM) included starting with Essentials, the cheapest paid tier. Advantage $6 and Premier $9 add other features. Reclassified from gated.
Per-host pricing. SCIM 2.0 via Okta/Azure but requires Enterprise contract. Full-Stack ~$58/host/mo. Median enterprise ACV ~$183K.
HR/benefits via insurance brokers. Custom pricing only. No documented native SCIM.
Flat-fee pricing. Basic $80/mo, Advanced $230/mo. No documented SCIM at any tier.
Resource-based pricing. Free self-managed exists. SAML/SSO on Platinum; SCIM typically Enterprise. Real deployments $1.5K-$50K+/mo.
Workplace tiers: Standard $3, Premium $5, Premium Plus $7 per active user/mo. SCIM on Premium+. Older Visitor product priced per location.
Pricing restructured Apr 2025: Collect $5/mo flat. Control $9 annual+Card, $18 annual no-Card, $36 PAYG. SCIM requires manual activation via concierge@expensify.com.
Full seat tiers: Starter free, Professional $16, Organization $55, Enterprise $90. SCIM role assignment and seat management exclusive to Enterprise.
Consumption-based (MAR). SCIM and SSO on Enterprise. Business Critical adds PCI/HIPAA. 2026: MAR now per-connector.
Flat-rate by builder seats/form limits. SCIM exists on Enterprise tier (Salesforce Solutions and Enterprise per docs). Suite $250+/mo adds documents/sign.
Free plan exists. Pro $15, Team $25 per member/mo. Enterprise V4 migrates to Adobe Admin Console which provides SCIM (Azure/Google Workspace IdPs only). No SCIM on Pro/Team.
Free tier exists. Growth $19, Pro $55, Enterprise $89 per agent/mo annual. SCIM provisions only agents (not end-user contacts), Enterprise-only.
Starter $19, Growth $49, Pro $99, Enterprise custom. SCIM on Pro (via Azure/Okta/OneLogin marketplace apps) and Enterprise.
Starter $19, Growth $59, Scale $99 per seat/mo, Premier custom. SAML SSO and SCIM on Scale and Premier only. Annual-only on those tiers.
Session-volume pricing. No public list. SCIM 2.0 endpoint requires Enterprise plan + active SAML SSO. Enterprise typically $80-200K+/yr.
Pricing is quote-based; third-party sources cite Essentials ~$150/u/mo and Enterprise ~$300/u/mo. SCIM is Enterprise-only and requires SAML SSO.
Bynder lists no public per-user pricing; SMB starter ~$450/mo (500GB). SCIM supported (Azure SCIM docs) and aligned to Enterprise/SSO tier. Status moved from unknown to gated.
Priced per-device, not per-user. SCIM 2.0 auto-provisioning is gated to Premium plan per Genetec docs.
Contact-based pricing, not per-user. No SCIM provisioning publicly documented on any tier including MAX (enterprise).
GitBook supports SAML SSO with JIT provisioning on Enterprise but does NOT support SCIM at any tier. Status changed from unknown to none.
Pricing unchanged. SCIM provisioning is Enterprise-only.
Status changed from none to gated. GitKraken Enterprise tier adds SCIM provisioning and advanced multi-domain SSO; quote-based, est. $15-25/u/mo.
Free tier has no SCIM. SCIM is included starting at Premium ($29/u/mo SaaS). Premium is both the lowest paid tier and the SCIM tier.
All pricing quote-based with $5K-$50K platform fee. SCIM is Enterprise-only and requires SAML SSO.
Google Workspace acts as both IdP and SP. SCIM API support available across all paid plans starting at $7/u/mo.
SCIM (Okta/Entra) is GA in Grafana Cloud Advanced/Enterprise tiers (Feb 2026 announcement). Pro is usage-based. Advanced is custom-quoted ~$25k/yr starting.
SCIM provisioning is Enterprise-only (request via CSM). Requires SAML SSO. Supported IdPs: Okta, Azure AD, OneLogin.
Plans renamed to Core/Plus/Pro. All pricing is quote-based. SCIM user provisioning available on higher tiers; pricing tied to headcount, not seats.
Gusto does not support inbound SCIM provisioning on any plan; only JIT via SAML SSO. Plus/Premium can push data outbound but not receive SCIM from an IdP.
Hatz AI supports SAML SSO + SCIM provisioning starting at SMB tier or higher. Pricing is quote-based through MSP partner channel. Status moved from unknown to gated.
Dropbox Sign does not natively support SCIM per Dropbox documentation. SAML SSO available but no SCIM at any tier.
Help Scout supports SAML SSO with IdP-side provisioning only; does not support SCIM (no Service Provider provisioning).
Heroku Enterprise supports SAML SSO but SCIM is still on the roadmap (not GA per heroku/roadmap issue #149). Status changed from gated to none. Only JIT via SSO.
SCIM provisioning is Enterprise-only at Hex; Team plan ($75/editor/mo) does not include SCIM. Status changed from unknown to gated.
HiBob includes native SCIM 2.0 support on all plans (requires SSO configured first). All pricing is quote-based.
Status changed from none to gated. Hootsuite supports SCIM 2.0 on Enterprise only ($15k/yr minimum + ~$1,800-2,000/u/mo).
SCIM is technically available on Professional, but SSO (required for SCIM) is Enterprise-only. Effective requirement is Enterprise at $150/seat/mo, min 10 seats.
iManage does not support native SCIM provisioning per Stitchflow; manual user lifecycle via Cloud Control Center. Status changed from gated to none.
SCIM is Enterprise-only (typically 300+ users). User reports cite SCIM as a $5,000 add-on on top of Enterprise. Enterprise est. ~$50/u/mo.
Per-server licensing (not per-user). Enterprise adds SAML + LDAP/AD; SCIM not explicitly listed. Treated as unknown pending direct confirmation.
New simplified tiers (Canvas Core / Plus / Next) announced 2026. All pricing remains Contact Sales / institutional only.
SCIM gated to Expert tier. Fin AI resolutions priced separately ($0.99/resolution).
Enterprise tier supports SAML SSO and LDAP/external auth but no native SCIM endpoint documented.
Status updated from 'none' to 'gated': Jam now documents SSO + Directory Sync (SCIM-style provisioning) on Enterprise plan. Public per-seat prices not disclosed; sales-led.
Flat SaaS pricing, not per-user. SCIM available from Enterprise X tier ($950/mo) up. Multiplier computed against base monthly price.
Status updated from 'unknown' to 'none': Jobber does not document native SCIM. Third-party IdPs (OneLogin) provide SAML SSO + provisioning, but no native SCIM endpoint. Core plan dropped to $29/mo.
JumpCloud is itself an identity platform; SCIM and SSO are core offerings. Free tier covers up to 10 users; paid plans Device Mgmt $11/u/mo, SSO $13/u/mo.
No native SCIM provisioning documented on any tier. Business plan (custom, 10+ seats) adds HIPAA but no SCIM listed.

Pricing now more transparent: Business Starter $2/u/mo, Business $4/u/mo, Enterprise ~$6/u/mo (~$72/u/yr). SCIM gated to Enterprise. Status 'gated' unchanged but published list prices replace prior 'Contact Sales' both sides.
Flat-rate per-instance subscriptions. Private Tenant $75/mo and Enterprise $400/mo do not document SCIM; login methods cannot be configured per-tenant.

notes: SCIM included on all paid plans (any Email plan from $20/mo). Free tier (up to 250 contacts) does not include SCIM. Contact-based, not seat-based pricing.

SCIM included in Business plan at $7/u/mo (includes SSO portal for 3 apps). Business + Add-Ons $9/u/mo adds unlimited SSO.

Plans restructured (Starter/Growth/Scale; Advanced/Agency tiers retired). Starter dropped from $25 to $18.75/mo annual. Flat per-account pricing. No SCIM provisioning documented at any tier. Status updated from 'unknown' to 'none'.
SSO and SCIM included on every product/plan. No SSO tax. $4K minimum annual commitment.
Per-service-connection pricing (not per-user). Foundation includes SSO; SCIM and release automation gated to Enterprise/Guardian (custom).
SCIM gated to Enterprise plan and requires SSO. Base pricing volume-tiered: 1-10 users $7/u/mo, 100-500 $5/u/mo, 1000+ $3/u/mo.

SAML SSO and SCIM remain Enterprise-only (custom pricing). Business at $16/u/mo does NOT include SCIM. Annual billing required.
SCIM supported only with Okta; Microsoft Entra and Google Workspace not supported. SSO/SCIM must be enabled by LinearB support.

Large tier ($49/agent/mo) adds SSO + custom roles + audit log, but no native SCIM provisioning documented at any tier.
Volume/session-based pricing, not per-user. No native SCIM at any tier; Enterprise includes SSO/SAML but not SCIM.
SCIM delivered via Atlassian Guard Standard, bundled free in Enterprise. Guard Standard $4/u/mo if added standalone with Business.
Enterprise list ~$199/u/yr (~$16.6/u/mo) with volume discounts; quoted by sales.
No native SCIM. Provisioning only via third-party Aquera connector through Okta. Contact-based pricing.
SAML SSO on Scale+ with JIT provisioning but no native SCIM. Volume-based pricing, not per-user.
No native SCIM as of 2026-06. SSO requires Premium 100k+ (~$280/mo). Volume-based pricing.
Enterprise plan (~$750/mo) includes SAML SSO with JIT provisioning but no native SCIM. Volume-based pricing.
SSO (SAML/OIDC via Okta) on Enterprise but no native SCIM provisioning documented.

notes: Professional includes AD/LDAP sync + SAML SSO. Full SCIM provisioning typically gated to Enterprise (Contact Sales).

notes: M365 acts as IdP via Entra. Outbound SCIM provisioning to other apps available even on free Entra tier. Status remains 'free'.

Status changed from 'unknown' to 'gated'. SCIM provisioning requires Pro or Enterprise edition per New Relic docs. Per-user pricing applies to full-platform users.

Product winding down (shutdown announced Sept 2024); shifting to Enterprise-only. Standard plan $6.50/u/mo (11+ users); Startup $1/u/mo for 6-10.

Status changed from unknown to none. Plausible Enterprise includes SAML SSO but explicitly does NOT include SCIM provisioning. Flat pricing normalized to ~$2/u/mo for small team.
Three tiers (Starter ~$15, Professional ~$30, Enterprise ~$40 per agent/mo). SCIM provisioning not publicly documented; identity management reserved for Enterprise/custom quotes.
Status changed from unknown to gated. Three team tiers: Starter $399, Professional $579, Enterprise $779/u/yr. SSO + SCIM provisioning standard on Enterprise; may be add-on for Professional.
Plans now: Free, Solo $9, Team $19, Enterprise $49 per user/mo (annual). SCIM exclusive to Enterprise. Team plan replaces previous Basic ($14).

Free plan discontinued Oct 2025; replaced by 30-day Starter trial. New tiers: Starter $49, Growth, Pro $349/mo; Enterprise/Enterprise Plus custom. Usage-based (renders), not per-seat. No SCIM documented.

Procore has no native SCIM endpoint per support docs; SAML SSO only. Status changed from 'partial' to 'none'. Pricing is Contact Sales, ACV-based with unlimited users.
Pricing page now consolidated to single Spark tier at $15/maker/mo (annual). Enterprise tier still gates SCIM/SAML SSO/audit logs and is Contact Sales.
SCIM is now on Business Critical tier per current docs (not Enterprise). Enterprise is $400/mo flat unlimited users. Team is $40/mo flat for up to 10 users (~$4/u/mo normalized).
No SCIM on any plan (Simple Start $38, Essentials, Plus, Advanced $275). No SAML/OIDC enterprise SSO either. Single-user/small-business focused.
SCIM, SSO, and SAML included on all tiers including Free. Plus tier is $15/u/mo.
Per-module volume pricing (not per-user). SAML SSO available as add-on/Business plan, but no SCIM publicly documented across any tier.
ReadMe offers SAML SSO/OAuth on Business+/Enterprise but does not currently offer SCIM provisioning. Status changed from 'unknown' to 'none'. Enterprise starts $3,000+/mo. Pro is flat-priced.
Now part of Dropbox (acquired Aug 2024). Pricing unchanged: Enterprise $22/seat/mo monthly adds SCIM + SSO + domain capture. Free Lite tier exists.

Tellent Recruitee shows tier names (Start, Advance, Optimize) only; specific pricing not published. SAML SSO available on Optimize tier; SCIM not publicly documented. Could not fully verify SCIM availability on 2026-06-12.
EOR is $599/emp/mo annual or $699 monthly. Contractor flat $29. SCIM publicly documented but plan/tier requirements remain Contact Sales-gated.
Volume-based pricing (Free 3K/mo, Pro $20+, Scale $90+, Enterprise custom). Enterprise mentions SSO but no SCIM documented at any tier.
SSO/SAML available on Master plan ($10/person/mo) for 30+ users. No SCIM documented on any plan per pricing page and help docs. Status changed from 'unknown' to 'none'.
Tiers: Free, Team ($10/builder), Business ($50/builder), Enterprise (custom). SAML SSO at Business; SCIM gated to Enterprise per Retool docs. Status changed from 'unknown' to 'gated'.

Flat per-team-room pricing, not per-user. Business plan ($59/room/mo) adds SAML SSO + SCIM (User Management SCIM API). Enterprise tier for 25+ teams. SCIM is at Business tier, not Enterprise; multiplier reflects $59/$39 flat.
Tiers: Essential $59, Pro $119, Business $249, Enterprise $749/mo (all flat, monthly). Enterprise includes SSO but no SCIM publicly documented.

SCIM 2.0 supported across all paid tiers (Core $20, Advanced $25, Ultra $35 annual). Caveat: licenses must be pre-purchased before SCIM can provision. 'Free' status reflects SCIM available at the cheapest paid tier.
Pricing publicly opaque (Contact Sales). IAM module ~$8/u/mo for SSO+SCIM, requires base Unity HRIS subscription. $2,000 implementation fee.
Pro plan retired to legacy April 2026. Free Starter is self-hosted only. Enterprise gates SCIM. Status changed from 'none' to 'gated' as Enterprise supports SCIM via directory group mapping.
Volume-based pricing tied to event count, not per-user. Advanced ($32.50/mo) adds SAML SSO + SCIM provisioning. Multiplier ~2.1x at entry volume.
Enterprise plans now publicly note SSO+SCIM+OAuth (Microsoft Entra SCIM docs available). Enterprise starts ~$30/u/mo per recent sources; still custom-quoted.
Tiers: Free, Plus $8/u, Pro $79+$8/u, Enterprise custom. SAML SSO at Pro+; no SCIM publicly documented. Status changed from 'unknown' to 'none'.
Tiers: Free, Standard $12, Pro $28, Max/Unlimited $76, Enterprise custom. Enterprise includes SSO + compliance + workspace analytics; SCIM bundled with Enterprise.
No native SCIM endpoint. SAML SSO only via Okta/Entra. Provisioning requires third-party connector (Aquera) or custom XML API integration.
SCIM gated behind Enterprise edition. 7x jump from Starter ($25) to Enterprise ($175). Pro Suite ($100) sits between but does not include SCIM. Prices raised ~6% in late 2025.
Salesloft does not publish list pricing. Third-party data places base around $125/u/mo and SCIM-enabled Premier/Enterprise around $180/u/mo. SCIM requires Enterprise tier.
Sanity does not support SCIM on any plan. Relies on SAML role mapping for user provisioning. SAML SSO is a $1,399/mo Growth add-on or included in Enterprise.
Sauce Labs prices by concurrent VM capacity, not per user (unlimited users on all plans). SCIM available via Okta integration on Enterprise tier. Multipliers not meaningful given consumption model.
Priced per screen, not per user. SCIM, SSO, and API gated to Enterprise tier with 25-screen minimum.

Plans renamed in 2026 to Fundamentals/Complete/Defense. SCIM available on Complete tier but must email accountmanagement@secureframe.com to enable. Per-user pricing not published; multiplier estimated from annual contract ratio (~$20K vs ~$11K midpoints).
SCIM gated to Business tier and requires separate SSO Edition add-on. Twilio Console SCIM still in beta. Pricing by MTU volume, not per user.
No SCIM at any tier. Enterprise plan offers SAML v2 SSO and advanced user permissions but no SCIM provisioning. Priced by contacts, not users.

scim_plan: Premier (via Twilio Organizations API, private beta)
notes: SCIM in private beta via Twilio Organizations API. Requires Premier-tier engagement with account executive. JIT provisioning is the only standard option today (read-only Restricted Access by default).

scim_price_text: Contact Sales (~$10,000/yr+, SAML SSO add-on $324/mo on Professional)
notes: SAML SSO available on Professional as $324/mo add-on or included in Enterprise. SCIM only on Enterprise. Pricing by contacts/sends, not per user.
Per-endpoint pricing. SCIM gated to Singularity Enterprise tier (custom quote). Multiplier computed from Core ($5.83/endpoint/mo) vs Enterprise (~$14/endpoint/mo midpoint).
SCIM gated to Business tier ($80/mo annual / $89/mo monthly) or Enterprise. Not available on Team. Base subscription price (org-level, not per user).

Consolidated to Foundation/Advanced/Prime on 9 April 2026 (replacing 5 legacy tiers). No public pricing. Identity governance bundled across all AI-native tiers but enterprise SCIM/SSO requires Advanced or Prime.
ServiceTitan does not publish pricing or document SCIM support publicly. Pricing per tech ranges $245-500/mo across Starter/Essentials/Works. SCIM availability not confirmed.
Org-level pricing (not per user). Basic at $29/mo annual ($39 monthly). Plus tier required for SAML SSO and SCIM at $2,300/mo. 79.3x multiplier from Basic to Plus.

scim_price_text: Not offered (SAML SSO only on Enterprise $148/mo)
notes: Enterprise plan ($148/mo) includes SAML SSO with major IdPs but SCIM not documented or supported. Pricing per workspace, not per user.
Business plan at $12/u/mo includes SSO and SCIM (was previously an add-on). Enterprise pricing custom for 100+ seat deployments. 1.4x multiplier Team to Business.
Business+ raised from $12.50 to $15/u/mo in 2025 due to AI bundling. SCIM provisioning gated to Business+ and above. Enterprise+ (formerly Grid/Select) consolidated August 2024.
SCIM and Member/Participant SSO only on Enterprise. Included free with paid Webex licenses (Starter+) after Cisco acquisition. Pricing by participant capacity, not per user.
Smartling offers SAML SSO on Enterprise but no published SCIM documentation. Pricing by translation volume, not per user. SCIM availability not publicly confirmed.
Pro at $9/u/mo, Business at $32/u/mo. SCIM only on Enterprise (~$30-50/u/mo based on third-party data). SCIM permanently deletes users on deprovisioning - no soft-delete option.
SCIM 2.0 included in all editions (Standard, Enterprise, Business Critical, VPS). Token refresh required every 6 months. Native roles not SCIM-managed. Consumption-priced.

No native SCIM. Enterprise offers custom-attribute auto-provisioning via SAML/OIDC SSO with account-team setup - effectively a manual SCIM-like alternative. Status upgraded from 'none' to 'gated' to reflect this.
Enterprise tier offers SSO and API access but no documented SCIM support. Pricing by accounts/users included, not strict per-user.
Formerly SonarCloud. Pricing by lines of code analyzed. SCIM and advanced SSO gated to Enterprise tier (annual billing only, custom quote).
Plans are flat monthly (Lite $149, Pro $299, Growth $499, Enterprise custom). SSO/SCIM via WorkOS reachable through CSM/Sales; Spark Hire Recruit documents SCIM URL. Treated as gated/Contact Sales.
SCIM provisioning (Entra ID, Okta, OneLogin, JumpCloud) only on Splashtop Enterprise. Performance plan $13/u/mo sits below Enterprise.
Splunk Cloud SCIM is deprovision-only (no create/update) and requires Enterprise tier with SAML SSO. Pricing not publicly disclosed.
SSO/SAML is documented on Enterprise tier; native SCIM provisioning not publicly documented as of 2026-06-12. Status kept as unknown.
SSO available on Team ($137/mo) and above; SCIM and other advanced identity features only on Enterprise (custom, starts $799/mo).
SCIM is listed on Stoplight SmartBear product roadmap as not yet shipped. No SCIM on any plan today.
No native SCIM doc; OneLogin connector exists for provisioning. Pricing flat per plan (Core $35.99, Advanced $68.99, Business $249, Enterprise custom).
SCIM is Enterprise-only and requires SSO. Pricing not public; avg deal ~$38,808/yr per Vendr.
SCIM available on all Tableau Cloud tiers (Viewer $15, Explorer $42, Creator $75) as long as SSO is configured. Status free.
SCIM provisioning (Entra ID, Okta, OneLogin, ADFS) requires Tensor license. Standard tiers (Remote Access $24.90, Business $50.90, Premium $112.90, Corporate $229.90) are flat-monthly with seat caps.
SCIM/automatic user provisioning is gated to Enterprise (custom pricing). Plans: Free, Deliver $10.99, Grow $19.99, Scale $54.99, Enterprise.
Teleport pricing is per-resource, not per-user. SCIM lives inside Identity Governance, available only on Teleport Enterprise (Cloud or Self-Hosted). Status changed from none to gated.

team_price_text: Essentials: greater of $100/mo or 5% of consumption
notes: SCIM requires Enterprise/Mission Critical or a +$500/mo add-on on top of Business plan ($500/mo). SAML SSO also required.
SAML SSO and SCIM provisioning are gated to Cloud Enterprise ($74/seat/mo, annual only). Exactly 2x Professional.

SCIM (Okta, Azure, OneLogin) listed as included on Business, Growth, and Enterprise. Plans: Individual $4.16, Business $10.41, Growth $13.54, Enterprise custom. SCIM is no longer Growth-only; it is on Business.

team_price_text: Starter Kit: $0 software / hardware + processing fees
notes: Toast uses proprietary Toast Login for staff; no SAML SSO or SCIM provisioning. Employee management only via Labor API. Status none.
SAML SSO available on Business plan; no native SCIM endpoint. User provisioning only via REST API.
SAML SSO on Premium ($18/u/mo); no native SCIM. User mgmt via REST API or manual invites.
Enterprise+ plan lists SAML SSO and advanced security; SCIM not publicly documented. Plans (annual): Starter $139, Growth $369, Advanced $749, PRO $1549, Enterprise+ custom.

scim_price_text: Atlassian Guard from $4/u/mo on top of Enterprise $17.50/u/mo
notes: SCIM provisioning via Atlassian Guard Standard (~$4/u/mo) on top of Trello Enterprise ($17.50/u/mo, 50-seat min). Combined ~$21.50/u/mo vs $5 Standard.
Twilio SCIM API is GA but restricted to Enterprise plans with the paid SSO Edition add-on. JIT provisioning not supported.
Plans (flat monthly to ~5 users): Basic $29, Plus $59, Business $99, Growth Essentials $199, Growth Pro $349, Enterprise custom. SSO/SCIM gated to Enterprise.
Enterprise tier lists SSO (SAML, OIDC) but no public SCIM documentation. Treated as none.
Custom SAML SSO documented on Enhanced and Premium plans. No public SCIM endpoint documentation; HRIS/AD/payroll integrations available. Status kept as unknown.
Annual contract pricing only. Core ~$10K/yr (single framework), Growth ~$30K, Scale up to ~$80K, Enterprise $49K-$80K+ where SCIM 2.0 lives. Not per-user.
Vault uses base + named-user licensing, all custom. SCIM 2.0 supported on Enterprise per 18R2 release. Industry estimates put per-user at $50-$200/mo but never published.

scim_plan: Add-on (Directory Sync on Pro) or Enterprise
scim_price_text: $150/mo flat add-on (requires $300/mo SAML add-on); included in Enterprise
notes: Status changed: SCIM Directory Sync now available on Pro as $150/mo flat add-on, but requires $300/mo SAML add-on first. Effectively $450/mo extra over Pro base.
Status moved from partial to gated: SSO/SCIM-class features sit on Enterprise tier ($25/u/mo annual, $45/u/mo monthly). Starter $5/u/mo annual baseline.
Webflow ships two product lines: site plans (Basic $15/mo) and Workspace plans (Core $19/mo). SCIM provisioning is Enterprise-only and requires SSO to be enabled first.
Swiss vendor; pricing in CHF. USD figures use ~1.10 CHF=USD. Enterprise adds SCIM provisioning, SAML SSO, ADFS, BYOK.
Pro (formerly Teams) is $50/u/mo for orgs under 50 employees; SCIM and full enterprise security on the custom-priced Enterprise tier.
AWS Wickr supports SSO (OIDC/SAML, Active Directory sync via ADFS) but no native SCIM provisioning. Premium tier up to $25/u/mo.
Wix site plans are flat per-site, not per-user. Light $17/mo is single-contributor; team features and SCIM-class identity sit on custom-priced Enterprise.

Flat monthly pricing tied to employee count bands, not per-user. SAML SSO included on Premier/Enterprise (add-on for Standard). SCIM-style directory sync is Enterprise-tier; multiplier computed as $719/$299.
No published pricing. PEPM commonly $35-$100. SCIM available but requires Enterprise tier and SSO must be configured first (otherwise 403).

Wrike restructured plans in Jan 2026: standalone Enterprise tier end-of-sale for new buyers; SCIM now sits on custom-priced Pinnacle/Apex. Team plan price updated to $10/u/mo (annual). Business $25/u/mo annual.
Enterprise lists SSO/SAML but no public documentation of native SCIM support. Could not confirm on 2026-06-12.
No native SSO or SCIM on any plan in 2026. All plans include unlimited users. Customers continue to ask publicly for Entra/SCIM support. Third-party SSO proxies (miniOrange) are the only path.
Breeze is per-unit, not per-user. SCIM available only via YardiOne on Voyager Enterprise (custom pricing, $30K-$150K+/yr typical).

Priced per screen (treated as per-user for normalization). April 2026 price increase added $1/screen to Premium and Enterprise; Basic unchanged. SCIM, SSO, custom roles, audit logs all Enterprise-only.
Free + Pro ($29.99/mo) + Team ($103.50/mo) + Enterprise custom. SCIM, unlimited users, audit logs all gated to Enterprise. Pro is task-based flat, not per-user.
SCIM 2.0 (via Okta/Entra) requires Suite Professional or above. Native SCIM not exposed publicly. Enterprise tier $169/agent/mo.
Team plan price updated to $6/editor/mo (was previously listed as Starter $13.75). Organization $12/editor/mo (12-seat minimum). SCIM and SSO gated to Enterprise.
zeroheight has explicitly stated they do not support SCIM and have no plans to introduce it. SSO is Enterprise-only.
June 2026 lineup refresh renamed Enterprise to Scale. Pro $9.95/u/mo, Team $12/u/mo. SCIM and SSO gated to Scale (custom).
Free tier exists but Pro $13.33/u/mo is the cheapest plan a paying team would actually default to; SCIM 2.0 native requires Business $18.33/u/mo. Using Pro as team plan baseline yields ~1.4x jump.
